emails.subject: US PurEth OPIS vs LLDPE CMAI
emails.subject_base: US PurEth OPIS vs LLDPE CMAI
emails.body: US PurEth OPIS vs LLDPE CMAI Tana/Karen: The product long description described below will fall under the new product type US PurityEthane Fin Spread. Tom Moran has approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Plastic LLDPE Financial Swap Please respond no later than 10 a.m. on Wednesday, December 12. Thank you. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 12/12/2000 12:56 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Kevin Meredith ENRON 12/11/2000 05:29 PM
